subcodes.first_line: The Book from Him Who was wronged unto one who hath attained unto the remembrance of God and His praise, and hath turned unto His horizon when others turned away from Him [3.5s]... ...My God, my God! I entreat Thee by the fragrance of Thy raiment, and Thy footsteps in the lands Thou hast traversed
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی المظلوم لمن فاز بذکر الله و ثنائه و الاقبال الی افقه اذ اعرض عنه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement
